prompt:
Subject: Fingertip Mischief

Main Subject: 3:4 vertical indoor selfie. A single woman in her 20s, positioned large in the center-left, showing from the top of the head to the chest. The face and upper body occupy about 75% of the frame, with a raised hand in the upper right and the flow of hair and shoulders in the lower left.

Person/Expression: Bright ivory-beige fair skin with a very pale pink flush. Natural highlights on the cheeks, nose, shoulders, and collarbones, with a smooth texture that preserves skin grain. Pale rose pink blush, champagne beige and pink-brown eyeshadow, long thin lashes, natural tear bags, and soft light brown eyebrows. Transparent pink-beige gloss lips. A small, clear catchlight in the eyes. Head tilted slightly to the left, looking straight at the camera. Lips slightly open, with a playful yet elegant look, with just the tip of the tongue peeking out from the center of the lower lip.

Clothing/Pose: A camisole layered with white dot tulle and fine lace. Delicate frills on the shoulder straps and chest, with a small satin ribbon in the center. A small silver flower motif pendant at the neck. The subject's right arm is raised to the side of the head, with the index finger extended horizontally toward the hairline. Other fingers are naturally curled, with no extra tension in the shoulders or arms.

Background/Lighting: A quiet indoor background consisting only of a beige wall and a diagonal dark gray band. The background is slightly blurred, with no everyday objects or text. Soft warm lighting enters from the upper left, creating thin highlights on the hair surface, forehead, bridge of the nose, cheeks, collarbones, and shoulders. Shadows from the hand and arm fall naturally to the lower right, with faint reflected light on the chest.

Composition/Camera: Close-up selfie taken with a smartphone held slightly higher than the face. Slight high-angle, natural perspective equivalent to 35-45mm. Focus on both eyes and lips, with the hair ends and background gently blurred. Narrow margin at the top, and a small amount of margin outside the right hand, with the face, fingertips, and pendant arranged in a triangle.

Texture/Style: Bright milk-tea ash brown medium-long hair. Thin see-through bangs, layers along the face, and ends curled slightly inward. Delicate depiction of individual hair strands, fine highlights, soft shine, and a few stray hairs. Elegant Japanese beauty selfie photography. Maintains a moderate sharpness and natural smartphone photography feel, avoiding excessive blurring or artificial skin retouching.

Negative: Unnatural face, tongue deformation, tooth collapse, unnatural gaze, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused fingers, broken wrists or joints, hair and finger fusion, distorted accessories, shadows inconsistent with light source, plastic-like skin, excessive skin retouching, text, logos, watermarks.

promptZh:
主题：指尖的恶作剧

主要主体：3:4 竖构图室内自拍。一位 20 多岁的女性，位于画面中左侧，占据较大比例，展示从头顶到胸部的范围。面部和上半身占据画面的 75% 左右，右手抬起位于右上角，头发和肩膀的线条延伸至左下角。

人物/表情：明亮的象牙米色白皙皮肤，带有淡淡的粉色红晕。脸颊、鼻梁、肩膀和锁骨处有自然的高光，皮肤纹理细腻，保留了真实的肤质感。淡玫瑰粉色腮红，香槟米色和粉棕色眼影，长而纤细的睫毛，自然的卧蚕，柔和的浅棕色眉毛。透明的粉米色亮面唇妆。双眼中带有清晰的小巧眼神光。头部微微向左倾斜，直视镜头。双唇微张，带有 俏皮而优雅的神情，下唇中央微微露出一点舌尖。

服装/姿势：叠穿白色波点薄纱和精致蕾丝的吊带衫。肩带和胸前有精致的褶边，中心饰有一条小巧的缎带蝴蝶结。颈部佩戴一枚小巧的银色花朵图案吊坠。主体右手抬起至头部侧面，食指水平指向发际线方向。其余手指自然弯曲，肩膀和手臂没有多余的紧张感。

背景/光线：安静的室内背景，仅由米色墙壁和一条对角线的深灰色带组成。背景轻微虚化，没有日常杂物或文字。柔和的暖光从左上方射入，在发丝表面、额头、鼻梁、脸颊、锁骨和肩膀上形成细微的高光。手部和手臂的阴影自然地投射在右下方，胸前有淡淡的反射光。

构图/相机：使用略高于面部的智能手机拍摄的近距离自拍。轻微的高角度，相当于 35-45mm 的自然视角。焦点对准双眼和嘴唇，发梢和背景轻微虚化。顶部留白较少，右手外侧留有少量空间，面部、指尖和吊坠呈三角形排列。

纹理/风格：明亮的奶茶灰棕色中长发。轻薄的空气刘海，脸颊两侧有层次感，发梢微微内扣。细腻地描绘了单根发丝、细微的高光、柔和的光泽以及几缕碎发。优雅的日系美颜自拍风格。保持适度的清晰度和自然的手机摄影感，避免过度虚化或人工磨皮。

负面提示词：面部不自然、舌头变形、牙齿崩坏、眼神不自然、多指、缺指、手指粘连、手腕或关节断裂、头发与手指融合、配饰扭曲、阴影与光源不一致、塑料感皮肤、过度磨皮、文字、Logo、水印。
